description.p: Tributary is a modern, Rhythmbox-style music manager built in Rust with GTK4 and libadwaita. It provides a unified interface for managing and streaming music from multiple sources:

ul.li: Local library with fast filesystem scanning
DAAP / iTunes library sharing over mDNS

description.p: All backends share a common data model, ensuring a consistent experience regardless of where your music lives.

screenshot.caption: Tributary main window with library browser and tracklist

ul.li: Realtime text search filter above the browser panes — search across title, artist, album, and genre
Song properties dialog with metadata editing for MP3, M4A/AAC, OGG, and FLAC files
Batch metadata editing for multiple selected tracks
MusicBrainz auto-fill lookup in the properties dialog

description.p: Bug fixes for DAAP date handling, Avahi discovery, preferences UI, and more.
Internet Radio, manual server addition, mDNS discovery refresh, About dialog, and more.
Initial release — project skeleton and architecture.
